title: ICAR IARI Notification 2026 - Apply for Young Professional I Posts
description: ICAR-Indian Agricultural Research Institute (ICAR IARI) issued the official notification for 2026. To fill the vacancies for Young Professional I Jobs. Those candidates who have qualified in the B.Sc can grab this chance and apply for the ICAR IARI Notification 2026 . Here, we have included the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, application fee, and how to apply for these posts. Interested and eligible candidates can apply before the last date of application. I...
